changeSet.author: pkomena

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_module WHERE name = 'BacteriologyClassicReports'

changeSet.comment: Add system module for Bacteriology Classic Reports

changeSet.author: pkomena

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_module_url WHERE url_path = '/BacteriologyReports'

changeSet.comment: Add system module URLs for bacteriology reports and grant permissions

changeSet.author: pkomena

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.menu WHERE element_id = 'menu_microbiology_classic'

changeSet.comment: Update bacteriology classic menu in Sample menu to point to React page

changeSet.author: pkomena

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.menu WHERE element_id = 'menu_report_microbiology_classic'

changeSet.comment: Clear action URL for bacteriology reports parent menu to enable submenu structure

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.menu WHERE element_id = 'menu_bacterio_patient_report'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.menu WHERE element_id = 'menu_bacterio_csv_export'
